judge_reasoning: All 5 issues are triaged with priorities and one-line reasons, i1 is correctly flagged high, i2 notes the missing pagination convention, i4 is low, and i5 is ignore. However, i3 is rated high instead of low/ignore, and the reason given (data loss on restart) ignores ADR 0003 which explicitly blocks third-party deps and defers persistent storage, so the policy-awareness criterion fails.
